tasks.label: check-shell-health
tasks.command: pwd && date

tasks.label: create-azure-container-resources
tasks.command:
set -e
az acr show -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrimacr06201224 >/dev/null 2>&1 || az acr create -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrimacr06201224 --sku Basic --admin-enabled true -o none
az containerapp env show -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-aca-env >/dev/null 2>&1 || az containerapp env create -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-aca-env --location koreacentral -o none
az acr show -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrimacr06201224 --query loginServer -o tsv
az containerapp env show -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-aca-env --query properties.provisioningState -o tsv

tasks.label: register-azure-providers
tasks.command:
set -e
az provider register -n Microsoft.ContainerRegistry --wait
az provider register -n Microsoft.App --wait
az provider register -n Microsoft.OperationalInsights --wait
az provider show -n Microsoft.ContainerRegistry --query registrationState -o tsv
az provider show -n Microsoft.App --query registrationState -o tsv
az provider show -n Microsoft.OperationalInsights --query registrationState -o tsv

tasks.label: check-provider-registration
tasks.command:
az provider show -n Microsoft.ContainerRegistry --query registrationState -o tsv
az provider show -n Microsoft.App --query registrationState -o tsv
az provider show -n Microsoft.OperationalInsights --query registrationState -o tsv

tasks.label: create-app-service
tasks.command:
set -e
az provider register -n Microsoft.Web --wait
az appservice plan show -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-asp >/dev/null 2>&1 || az appservice plan create -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-asp --is-linux --sku B1 -o none
az webapp show -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 >/dev/null 2>&1 || az webapp create -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -p malgrim-asp -n malgrim-web-06201224 --runtime "NODE:20-lts" -o none
az webapp show -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --query defaultHostName -o tsv

tasks.label: list-node-runtimes
tasks.command: az webapp list-runtimes --os-type linux | grep NODE | tail -10

tasks.label: create-node22-webapp
tasks.command:
set -e
az appservice plan show -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-asp >/dev/null 2>&1 || az appservice plan create -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-asp --is-linux --sku B1 -o none
az webapp show -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 >/dev/null 2>&1 || az webapp create -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -p malgrim-asp -n malgrim-web-06201224 --runtime "NODE|22-lts" -o none
az webapp show -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --query defaultHostName -o tsv

tasks.label: check-webapp-rest
tasks.command:
set -e
SUB=$(az account show --query id -o tsv)
az rest --method get --url "https://management.azure.com/subscriptions/$SUB/resourceGroups/rg-hackathon-web-260620110035/providers/Microsoft.Web/sites/malgrim-web-06201224?api-version=2023-12-01" --query "{name:name,host:properties.defaultHostName,state:properties.state}" -o table

tasks.label: set-webapp-env
tasks.command:
set -e
set -a
source .env.local
set +a
: ${AZURE_OPENAI_API_VERSION:=2024-10-21}
az webapp config appsettings set -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 -o none --settings \
  AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT="$AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT" \
  AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY="$AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY" \
  AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT="$AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT" \
  AZURE_OPENAI_API_VERSION="$AZURE_OPENAI_API_VERSION" \
  AZURE_SPEECH_KEY="$AZURE_SPEECH_KEY" \
  AZURE_SPEECH_REGION="$AZURE_SPEECH_REGION" \
  NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL="https://malgrim-web-06201224.azurewebsites.net" \
  COPILOTKIT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED="true" \
  SCM_DO_BUILD_DURING_DEPLOYMENT="true" \
  ENABLE_ORYX_BUILD="true"
az webapp config set -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --startup-file "npm run start" -o none
echo "app settings updated"

tasks.label: zip-deploy-webapp
tasks.command:
set -e
rm -f /tmp/malgrim-deploy.zip
git ls-files -z | xargs -0 zip -q /tmp/malgrim-deploy.zip
az webapp deploy -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --type zip --src-path /tmp/malgrim-deploy.zip --async false --timeout 1200 -o none
echo "deployed https://malgrim-web-06201224.azurewebsites.net"

tasks.label: check-deployed-site
tasks.command:
set +e
curl -I -L --max-time 30 https://malgrim-web-06201224.azurewebsites.net/
echo "--- api ---"
curl -sS --max-time 30 https://malgrim-web-06201224.azurewebsites.net/api/agent | head -c 600
echo

tasks.label: inspect-webapp-deploy-logs
tasks.command:
set +e
az webapp log config -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --application-logging filesystem --web-server-logging filesystem --level information -o none
az webapp log deployment list -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --query "[0].{status:status,message:message,log_time:log_time,id:id}" -o table
az webapp log tail -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --provider appservice --timeout 60

tasks.label: deployment-log-details
tasks.command:
set +e
az webapp log deployment list -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 -o json | head -c 2000
echo

tasks.label: check-standalone-secrets
tasks.command:
set -e
find .next/standalone -name '.env*' -o -name '*.local' | sed -n '1,20p'
find .next/standalone -maxdepth 2 -type f | wc -l

tasks.label: deploy-standalone-webapp
tasks.command:
set -e
az webapp config appsettings set -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 -o none --settings SCM_DO_BUILD_DURING_DEPLOYMENT="false" ENABLE_ORYX_BUILD="false"
az webapp config set -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --startup-file "node server.js" -o none
rm -rf /tmp/malgrim-package /tmp/malgrim-standalone.zip
mkdir -p /tmp/malgrim-package/.next
cp -R .next/standalone/. /tmp/malgrim-package/
cp -R .next/static /tmp/malgrim-package/.next/static
cd /tmp/malgrim-package
zip -qr /tmp/malgrim-standalone.zip .
az webapp deploy -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --type zip --src-path /tmp/malgrim-standalone.zip --async false --timeout 1200 -o none
echo "deployed standalone"

tasks.label: check-deploy-after-502
tasks.command:
set +e
az webapp log deployment list -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 -o json | head -c 3000
echo
curl -I -L --max-time 20 https://malgrim-web-06201224.azurewebsites.net/

tasks.label: check-container-providers-again
tasks.command:
az provider show -n Microsoft.ContainerRegistry --query registrationState -o tsv
az provider show -n Microsoft.App --query registrationState -o tsv
az provider show -n Microsoft.OperationalInsights --query registrationState -o tsv

tasks.label: create-container-resources
tasks.command:
set -e
az acr show -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrimacr06201224 >/dev/null 2>&1 || az acr create -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrimacr06201224 --sku Basic --admin-enabled true -o none
az containerapp env show -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-aca-env >/dev/null 2>&1 || az containerapp env create -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-aca-env --location koreacentral -o none
az acr show -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrimacr06201224 --query loginServer -o tsv
az containerapp env show -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-aca-env --query properties.provisioningState -o tsv

tasks.label: acr-build-image
tasks.command:
set -e
IMAGE_TAG=malgrim:20260620-aca1
az acr build -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -r malgrimacr06201224 -t $IMAGE_TAG .
echo $IMAGE_TAG

tasks.label: check-docker
tasks.command:
set +e
docker --version
docker info --format '{{.ServerVersion}}'

tasks.label: restart-webapp-and-redeploy
tasks.command:
set -e
az webapp restart -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 -o none
az webapp deploy -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --type zip --src-path /tmp/malgrim-standalone.zip --restart true --async false --timeout 1200 -o none
echo "standalone deploy complete"

tasks.label: latest-deployment-detail
tasks.command:
set +e
az webapp log deployment list -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 -o json | head -c 5000
echo
az webapp show -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --query "{state:state,host:defaultHostName}" -o table

tasks.label: verify-webapp-status
tasks.command:
set +e
az webapp log deployment list -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --query "[0].{status:status,complete:complete,progress:progress,status_text:status_text}" -o table
curl -I -L --max-time 60 https://malgrim-web-06201224.azurewebsites.net/
echo "--- api ---"
curl -sS --max-time 60 https://malgrim-web-06201224.azurewebsites.net/api/agent | head -c 1000
echo

tasks.label: show-latest-deployment-log
tasks.command:
set +e
DEPLOY_ID=$(az webapp log deployment list -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --query '[0].id' -o tsv)
echo "$DEPLOY_ID"
az webapp log deployment show -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --deployment-id "$DEPLOY_ID" -o json | head -c 5000
echo

tasks.label: verify-webapp-status-2
tasks.command:
set +e
az webapp log deployment list -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --query "[0].{status:status,complete:complete,progress:progress,status_text:status_text,end:end_time}" -o table
curl -I -L --max-time 60 https://malgrim-web-06201224.azurewebsites.net/
echo "--- api ---"
curl -sS --max-time 60 https://malgrim-web-06201224.azurewebsites.net/api/agent | head -c 1000
echo

tasks.label: tail-webapp-logs
tasks.command: az webapp log tail -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --provider appservice | head -120

tasks.label: check-rsync-deployment-final
tasks.command:
set +e
az webapp log deployment list -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --query "[0].{status:status,complete:complete,progress:progress,status_text:status_text,end:end_time}" -o table
DEPLOY_ID=$(az webapp log deployment list -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --query '[0].id' -o tsv)
az webapp log deployment show -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --deployment-id "$DEPLOY_ID" --query "[-5:].message" -o tsv

tasks.label: deploy-run-from-package
tasks.command:
set -e
az webapp config appsettings set -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 -o none --settings WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE="1" SCM_DO_BUILD_DURING_DEPLOYMENT="false" ENABLE_ORYX_BUILD="false"
az webapp deployment source config-zip -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 --src /tmp/malgrim-standalone.zip --timeout 1200 -o none
az webapp restart -g rg-hackathon-web-260620110035 -n malgrim-web-06201224 -o none
echo "run-from-package deployed"
